title: Descriptors in PSBTs
description: Descriptors in PSBTs let coordinators and signers exchange script-template information alongside transaction data instead of relying on custom wallet metadata. They make it easier for different tools to reason about the same inputs, outputs, and signing responsibilities from a shared descriptor view.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Partially Signed Bitcoin Transactions
resources.notes: Source-native discussion of PSBT interoperability changes, including descriptor-related extensions and coordination patterns.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Output Script Descriptors
resources.notes: Source-native record of descriptor adoption and the later work to combine descriptors with signer and wallet workflows.

resources.title: BIP 174: Partially Signed Bitcoin Transaction Format
resources.notes: Base PSBT structure that later descriptor-carrying extensions build on.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for wallet interoperability, transaction construction, and signer coordination tradeoffs.
